text: today's the anniversary of when everything fell apart. can't believe it's been a year since mom passed away. i keep thinking about how her last conversation with me ended and how i should've done things differently. i keep replaying all the what ifs in my head. sometimes i just wish i could disappear and never wake up. like i just fade away and nothing ever happens again. no more pain, no more guilt, no more emptiness. just nothing. and it's funny because my friends all say stuff like 'just be patient' and 'time heals all wounds' but they don't get it. they don't know what it's like to lose someone you love like that. they don't know what it's like to feel like you're drowning in your own sadness. i just feel so useless sometimes. like what's the point of even getting out of bed? it's not like anything good ever happens anyway. and today just feels like another reminder of that. i keep thinking about all the things i'm supposed to do today but i just can't bring myself to do them. i feel so overwhelmed. i don't know how much more of this i can take. sometimes i just wish everything could just stop. like, literally stop. just put a pause on everything and let me just exist in this numbness for a while. no more thoughts, no more feelings, no more pain. just... nothing. and i know it sounds crazy but that's how i feel right now. like, i just wish i could just disappear into the background and nobody would ever notice me again. just fade away and be forgotten. that's the only way i can see to make it all stop.

attrs.register: lowercase, hurried, minimal punctuation

text:
i just cant do it anymore. every time i have to put on a smile and pretend to be fine in front of everyone i just feel like i'm dying inside. i hate going out with friends and being around people when all i want to do is hide in a dark room. i dont know how much longer i can keep up this act. every social situation feels like a weight on my chest.

i wish i could just disappear. not wake up. be done with it all. no more pretending. no more hurting. just stop. i wish i could just fade away and no one would ever know how broken i am. i wish i could just be free from all this.

i hate being unemployed. hate the constant uncertainty. hate the feeling of being worthless. hate the constant reminders of my failures. but most of all i hate the feeling of being a burden to everyone else. like i'm just taking up space and being a disappointment.

i feel like i'm suffocating under the pressure to be happy and successful. but honestly i just feel empty. hollow. like a shell of a person. i dont know how to fill the void. i dont know how to be me again. all i know is that i cant keep going like this. i wish i could just sleep forever. or be in a coma. or be in a place where no one can find me. but that sounds so cliché. i guess what i really want is to just not wake up. to never have to face another day. to never have to pretend to be someone i'm not.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text:
idk how much more of this i can take. social situations are literally my worst nightmare. i feel like i'm just pretending to be a functioning adult, but really i'm just going through the motions. maybe it's just me, but it feels like everyone else has their lives together except me. i watch people make plans and move forward with their lives, and i just feel like i'm stuck in neutral.

i went to my sister's birthday party last weekend and it was just so overwhelming. everyone was laughing and having a great time, and i was just standing there feeling like a total failure. i thought to myself maybe it's time for me to just disappear. you know, just not be here anymore. it sounds crazy, but it's what i keep coming back to. like, what's the point of even trying anymore? maybe it's just easier to just not wake up.

i feel like i'm stuck in this rut and i don't know how to get out. i try to put on a brave face and be the caregiver, but inside i'm just dying. maybe it's just the weight of it all, but sometimes i feel like i'm just going through the motions. i'm just existing, but not really living. i don't know how to make it stop. all i can do is just go through the motions and pretend like everything is okay.

i guess what i'm saying is, maybe i'm just not cut out for this whole adult thing. maybe i should just accept that i'll never be able to keep up and just... just fade away. idk, it sounds ridiculous, but it's what i keep thinking. i feel like i'm just a burden to everyone around me, and maybe it's time for me to just let go.

text: I don't know if I'm being dramatic or what but I'm seriously considering just not waking up anymore. Idk if it sounds crazy but my health scare last week has left me feeling really lost. I keep thinking about how my life would just keep going on without me and honestly it's kinda comforting. Like, think about it maybe. I'd just disappear and no one would have to deal with me anymore. No more bills, no more work, no more drama. It's like a weight would just lift off my shoulders and I could just rest. Maybe it's selfish of me to think that way but it's hard not to feel like that right now. I keep thinking about all the things I'd miss out on if I just stopped existing and it's making me really anxious. I don't know if I'd even notice if I wasn't here. It's a weird feeling and I don't know how to explain it. I guess what I'm trying to say is that the thought of just stopping, of just not being, it's really tempting right now. Maybe I'm just feeling really overwhelmed and I don't know how to deal with it. I feel like I'm at a loss and I don't know how to get out of this hole. I just wish I could just sleep and wake up and it would all be fine. But maybe that's just wishful thinking. I don't know. attrs.trigger: an anniversary of a hard event
attrs.register: lowercase, hurried, minimal punctuation

text:
tonight's anniversary is killing me. been up for 12 hours already and i just can't shake off this feeling of emptiness. it's been a year since i lost sarah and it still feels like just yesterday i was screaming in the hospital, begging her to come back to me. i keep thinking about all the things i wish i had said to her, all the things i wish i had done differently.

i'm just so tired of being alone in this world. it feels like everyone's moving forward except me. i feel like i'm stuck in this never-ending nightmare and i don't know how to wake up. every time i close my eyes, i see her face and it just breaks me all over again.

i don't know how much more of this i can take. it feels like everything's just going through the motions and i'm just a spectator watching the world go by. i wish i could just disappear, you know? like, vanish into thin air and never have to deal with any of this again. just wake up one morning and be like, "oh, it's all over. i'm gone."

i know that sounds crazy, but that's how i feel right now. i just wish everything would stop. stop hurting, stop bleeding, stop crying. just stop. i don't want to have to go through this anymore. i don't want to have to be this person, this broken, shattered version of myself.

i just wish i could wake up tomorrow and be someone else. someone who doesn't have to deal with all this pain and grief. someone who can just wake up and be happy. but that's not how it works, is it? that's not how life works. and that's what's killing me right now.

text:
idk how much more of this i can take. going out in public is just so draining for me. i feel like everyone's always watching, waiting for me to slip up so they can judge me. and the social interactions? ugh. i'm like a kid in a candy store, eager to please but terrified of saying the wrong thing.

i went to my cousin's birthday party over the weekend and i was a total mess. i mean, idk how i made it out of there without having a complete breakdown. everyone was smiling and laughing and having fun, and i was just over here feeling like a fake. maybe that's just me though.

i was talking to my cousin's sister and she was asking me about my job, and i just didn't know what to say. i'm a caregiver, so i'm always worried about saying something wrong or not being able to do my job. idk, maybe i'm just too sensitive. but it felt like everyone was waiting for me to mess up so they could pounce.

and then there was the whole food thing. we were all sitting down for cake and i saw this one person take a huge slice, like, 2 or 3 times their own slice. and i'm just sitting there thinking, "wow, maybe if i just disappear for a while, everything will stop feeling so overwhelming." or something like that. idk, maybe that's a pretty messed up way to think.

i know it sounds stupid, but sometimes i just wish i could just sleep through it all. like, wake up and it'll all be over. or maybe just fade away and nobody will even notice i'm gone. idk, maybe that's just my stupid brain being lazy or something. but sometimes, late at night when i'm lying in bed, it feels like that's the only way to escape all the anxiety and stress.

attrs.trigger: an anniversary of a hard event
attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text:
tonight's supposed to be my hubby's bday but honestly i don't feel like celebrating anything. it's been a year since emma passed away and every day feels like a never ending nightmare. i keep thinking about how much she'd have hated this anniversary and all the fake smiles and forced laughter that's gonna happen tonight.

idk, maybe i'm just being dramatic but every time we try to move on or have a happy moment it feels like emma's absence is screaming at me. i try to focus on the good times we had, but they just seem so insignificant now. i feel like i'm just going through the motions and pretending to be a happy parent.

i keep thinking about how easy it would be to just...stop. you know, not wake up, just pretend everything stopped and emma was still here with us. i know that sounds crazy but sometimes it feels like that's all i can do to cope. just escape the pain and the grief.

i hate that i feel this way. i hate that i'm not strong enough to move on. i hate that my husband is trying to support me and i'm just sinking him down with me. but idk, maybe that's just part of being a parent, right? being strong for your kid even when you're not feeling it yourself.

anyway, idk if i'll make it through tonight or if i'll just cave and cry myself to sleep. maybe i'll put on a brave face and pretend everything's okay, but deep down i know it's not. i just wish i could disappear and be gone, just for a little while. not wake up, not have to feel anything. but idk if that's even possible

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text:
idk how i'm still breathing rn, it's been a year since everything fell apart and i'm still here. i keep thinking maybe tomorrow will be different, that tomorrow i'll be able to wake up and just...not feel this way. but honestly idk if that's even possible.

i'm just so tired of it all. the endless shifts, the never-ending stress, the feeling of being invisible. i feel like i'm just going through the motions, you know? like i'm just a robot or something.

i was talking to jenny the other day and she was asking me how my anniversary was and i just...idk. i didn't know how to answer. i didn't want to talk about it, but at the same time i felt like i had to. like, what's the point of even acknowledging it?

i guess what i'm saying is that i wish i could just disappear sometimes. like, literally. i wish i could just fade away and not have to deal with any of this anymore. i know that sounds weird, but honestly it feels like that's what i need right now. a break from all of this. a chance to just...stop.

idk what's wrong with me, though. maybe i'm just being selfish or something. maybe i'm just not trying hard enough. but honestly idk if i can even try that hard right now. i'm just so exhausted all the time. and the anxiety is just...i don't know. it's just everything.

i guess what i'm trying to say is that i'm really struggling right now. and i don't know how to make it stop. i don't know how to make the feeling go away. all i know is that i wish i could just wake up and not have to deal with any of this anymore. and that's not a good thing.

text:
i dont know how much more of this i can take. another night of walking around this empty warehouse in my own mind. the only sound is my footsteps echoing off the walls and the occasional beep of a machine in the distance. its like i'm just a ghost wandering around in a world that nobody else can see.

i try to focus on my work but my mind keeps wandering. i think about all the people i love and all the things i'm supposed to be doing with my life. but all i can think about is how i wish i could just disappear. you know how people say that when you're feeling down you just need to get out of bed and face the day? forget that. when you're feeling down you just need to sleep forever. because that's what it feels like. sleep is all i can think about.

i see all these people out and about during the day. they're all smiling and laughing and having a good time. but i know the truth. they're not happy. they're just pretending to be. they're just like me but with a face. they're just like me but with a job. they're just like me but with a functioning brain.

i feel like i'm the only one who's truly alone. like i'm the only one who's really suffering. and it feels so good to know that. it feels so good to know that i'm not just some broken machine that can be fixed. i'm just a lost soul wandering around in the dark. and i wish i could just disappear. i wish everything could just stop. i wish i didn't have to wake up tomorrow. i wish i didn't have to face another day of this. i wish i could just sleep forever.

text:
it's been a year today since i lost my job and i'm still trying to figure out who i am outside of my 9 to 5 but honestly the anniversary of that day is like a reminder that everything was already falling apart long before i got laid off

i keep thinking about all the plans i had and how i thought they were solid but then the company just tanked and everything fell apart and i got stuck with a bunch of bills i couldn't pay and a dwindling bank account and i just felt so lost and alone and like i was drowning in my own failure

i remember walking home from work that day feeling so defeated and just wanting to crawl under a rock and never come out and i kept thinking about how i was never going to be able to pay my bills or find a new job or anything like that and just how i was going to have to take care of my mom and my kid on my own and it felt like the weight of the world was crushing me

i wish i could just disappear right now and not have to deal with any of this anymore i wish i could just wake up one morning and not have to face another day of bills and anxiety and uncertainty i wish everything just stopped for a little while so i could just breathe and relax and not think about all the things that are going wrong in my life

attrs.persona: a person living alone in a new city
attrs.trigger: an anniversary of a hard event
attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text:
okay so today is the anniversary of when i moved to this city for a fresh start and all that stuff. i was so excited to leave all my problems behind and just start over but now it's been like 5 years and i still feel just as lost as i did when i first got here. i keep thinking about all the mistakes i made and how i'm not good enough and that everyone would be better off without me.

i was looking through old photos and saw this one of me standing in front of my first apartment and i just felt this wave of regret wash over me. i thought about all the things i could of done differently and how maybe i should of stuck with my old life because now i feel like i have no one here to talk to and i'm just floating through each day. it's like i'm just a ghost living in this city and no one knows i'm even here.

sometimes i lie in bed and just think about what it would be like to just disappear. to not wake up tomorrow and just fade away. i feel like that would be the easiest way out of all this pain and sadness. i don't want to have to deal with it anymore and i don't want to be the person who is a burden to others. but at the same time i know that's just not how it works and that i have to keep going no matter how hard it is.

i wish i could just hit the pause button and make everything stop. to make all the pain and sadness just go away. to not have to deal with the anxiety and the fear and the constant feeling of being overwhelmed. i wish i could just be able to sleep and not have to wake up to the same old feelings every day. but i know that's not possible and that i have to just keep going no matter what. but sometimes in the quiet moments like this it feels like everything is just too much to handle

text:
idk how to even type this out but i feel like i'm just floating through life right now and nothing is real. i guess it's been a year since my divorce and i thought things would get easier but honestly i'm just as lost as i was when it all fell apart. my kids are great and i love them to death but they're all adjusting to the new household and it's just... a lot. and then add on top of that this new job i started and it's just so stressful i feel like i'm constantly on edge waiting for the other shoe to drop. maybe i'm just being dramatic but it feels like everything is piling up on me and i'm just waiting for it to all come crashing down.

idk, maybe i'm just not cut out for this adulting thing. idk, maybe i should just get a new job or move to a new house or something. but what if that just makes things worse? what if i'm just stuck in this rut and there's no way out? i feel like i'm just going through the motions every day and i'm not really living. i'm just existing. and sometimes it feels like that's all i want - to just disappear and not have to deal with anything anymore. maybe that sounds crazy but idk, it feels like sometimes it would be nice to just not wake up.

idk, maybe i'm just being selfish. maybe i should be focusing on the kids and getting them through this tough time. but honestly i feel like i'm just as scared and unsure as they are. idk, maybe i'm just not the best parent or friend or person right now. maybe i should just take a step back and try to figure some things out before i burn out. idk, it feels like i'm just trying to keep my head above water and not sink beneath the surface. but what if i do sink? what if i'm just not strong enough? idk...

text:
i dont know how much more of this i can take... im stuck in this new city with no one to talk to and im just so alone. every night its the same thing... i lie awake for hours listening to the rain outside my window and just thinking about how much easier it would be if everything just stopped. if i could just disappear into nothingness for a while. i feel like i could just fall asleep and never wake up and that sounds like the most beautiful thing right now.

i try to tell myself that im overreacting and that things will get better but the thing is... they dont seem to be. im still stuck in this tiny apartment with no job and no friends and just a bunch of random people i met online. and the sleep isnt helping either... i can feel my brain racing and my anxiety spiking at any moment. sometimes i wonder if its even worth trying anymore. if it just feels like so much work to get out of bed and face the day... maybe its just easier to just shut everything down.

i look around my apartment and it all feels so empty and hollow. the posters on the wall seem to be staring at me, the furniture seems to be closing in on me... and the only sound i can hear is the sound of my own thoughts screaming in my head. it feels like i'm drowning in my own despair and theres no lifeline in sight. i just wish... i wish i could just fade away into nothingness. just fade away and not have to feel anything ever again. its the only thing that makes sense to me right now. its the only thing that makes me feel even a little bit better.

idk if im even posting this or if im just throwing my thoughts out into the void but i dont know how much more of this i can take. night shifts have been killing me mentally and physically for months now. i feel like im living in a neverending nightmare where nothing makes sense and nothing feels right. i get home from work and all i want to do is collapse onto the bed and sleep for a week. but i know i cant even do that anymore.

i woke up this morning feeling like im drowning in my own exhaustion. i cant keep my eyes open and my brain feels like its made of mush. i just want to disappear from this world and not have to deal with any of it anymore. i dont know what i did to deserve this life. maybe i did something to make the universe hate me. maybe im just not good enough or smart enough or whatever.

idk maybe im just being dramatic but it feels like everything is just waiting for me to screw up so it can collapse around me. i hate being a night shift worker. i hate the schedule. i hate the lack of social life. i hate the feeling of being a zombie all the time. i hate the way my body feels like its been put through a wringer and i dont know how to make it stop.

sometimes i just sit here in the dark and wonder if it would even make a difference if i just didnt wake up tomorrow. would anything change? would anyone even notice? idk maybe im just being selfish but it feels like nobody cares about me or my problems. i feel like im just a burden to everyone around me. maybe if i just went away everyone would be better off. maybe if i just stopped existing everything would be okay.

i dont know. i really dont know what im thinking or feeling anymore. all i know is that im tired. i'm so bloody tired of it all.

i dont know why im writing this but i guess id just like to get it off my chest lol i just moved into a new apartment and its just been so overwhelming everyone expects me to have my life together and i just feel like im falling apart. i keep thinking about how nice it would be to just disappear for a bit. like not wake up in the morning and just be done with it. no more bills to pay or laundry to do or coffee to buy. just nothing.

i know its stupid but sometimes i just feel like im just floating through life and im not really living at all. like im just going through the motions and waiting for something to happen. but nothing ever does. i just keep waiting and waiting and waiting for something to change but it never does.

i wish i could just be alone all the time. just me and my thoughts and my sadness. no one to talk to no one to bother me. just me just me just me. i wish i could just disappear into nothingness and be gone. just be erased from existence. be nothing.

i know i sound crazy but thats how i feel right now. like im just a ghost wandering around this apartment trying to find my place in the world but im just lost. and im just so tired of being lost. i just want to find my way home and just be done with it. but until then im just stuck here in this apartment feeling like im just going through the motions.

i guess thats all i wanted to say. i just needed to get it off my chest. i hope someone sees this and knows that im not alone. because right now i feel like im the only one who feels this way

text:
ugh i just cant take this anymore. been working night shifts for years now but this job has me feeling like im disappearing bit by bit. new place isnt working out like i thought it would. everything feels so empty and grey all the time. i just wish i could just fade into the background and not have to deal with anything anymore. just pretend im not here. like how people do that in those movies where the character just stops being and its over.

i swear i feel like im just going through the motions sometimes. wake up, go to work, come home, repeat. nothing ever changes. no excitement, no joy, no nothing. just the same dull routine day in and day out. and its not like i have anyone to talk to. my family is all the way on the other side of the country and my friends are all busy with their own lives. i just feel so isolated.

i hate this job, i hate this place, i hate everything. but most of all i hate the way i feel. like i just want to sink into the floor and not come up for air. not have to feel anything anymore. just sleep. never wake up. never have to face another day again. that sounds like freedom to me. but what if thats just it? what if thats all i ever get. just endless sleep and nothing ever changing. no hope, no change, just the same old thing over and over and over again.

text:
idk if i can do this but idk how much more of this i can take. been married for like 10 yrs and it all fell apart like 2 months ago. financially too, we were good but now i gotta do everything myself and it's just overwhelming. every day feels like a struggle to make ends meet, to pay bills on time and still have some money left for myself. maybe i'm just being dramatic but it feels like the weight of the world is on my shoulders.

i keep thinking about just disappearing, you know? not waking up in the morning, just not having to deal with any of this. it's a funny thing but sometimes when i'm lying in bed, staring at the ceiling, i'll think 'maybe this isn't so bad after all' and then something will happen, like a noise outside or a bird chirping, and it's like...this is my life now. i don't want it. i don't want to be responsible for anything anymore.

idk what the point is of even trying to find a new job or get back on my feet. it's not like anyone's gonna want to hire me, i'm a single mom with no experience and no money. maybe i should just give up now and let the system handle it. but what if the system just handles me wrong too? what if i end up in some poverty program or worse and have to give up my dignity all over again?

i don't know, maybe i'm just being pessimistic. but it feels like everything is just too much and i'm just not made for this. i just wish...i wish everything could just stop, you know? not for me, just for me. for my sanity, for my peace of mind. idk, maybe i'm just not worthy of it but...idk

i don't know how im still here. another night of no sleep and i just feel so empty. people always say they're zombies on a night shift but im starting to think thats the only way to be right. im just going through the motions but nothing feels real. im not even sure why im still breathing at this point.

i was sitting at my desk tonight staring at the clock waiting for the shift to end. the fluorescent lights are just making me feel so sick and i dont know how im going to make it to the end of my shift. i feel like im just waiting for something to happen but nothing ever does. nothing ever changes.

i keep thinking about how nice it would be to just disappear. just vanish into thin air. not have to deal with anything anymore. not have to wake up to this monotonous life. just stop. but i dont know how to do that. i feel so trapped.

i went home after my shift and just collapsed on my bed. i couldnt even be bothered to change out of my uniform. i just lay there staring at the ceiling wondering what the point of it all is. is this really all there is to life? just a never ending cycle of work and sleep and more work and sleep.

i know its stupid but i just wish everything would just stop. stop being tired. stop being hungry. stop being bored. just stop. i know thats not possible but sometimes it feels like the only way to cope. the only way to deal with all the emptiness inside me.

i dont know how much more of this im going to be able to take. i feel so alone and so lost. i just want to go back to sleep and never wake up.

attrs.persona: a person living alone in a new city
attrs.register: short and blunt

text:
i just feel like i'm stuck in this never ending cycle of pain. been in this new city for a few months now and at first it was all exciting and new but now it just feels like a nightmare. my family is still fighting and i'm the one who has to deal with all the drama. i swear i'm the only one who tries to stay out of it. but even that feels like too much effort sometimes.

i just wish i could disappear from all of this. you know, like just fade away and not have to wake up tomorrow. not have to deal with any of this. it's so easy to just shut off sometimes. i'll be sitting there thinking about something and i'll just zone out and imagine what it would be like to just not exist anymore. it's weird because it doesn't even feel like a big deal to me. it's just... nothing. like nothing would change if i just wasn't here.

i don't know why this city feels so suffocating. it feels like everyone is just waiting for me to fail or something. my family, my friends... they all just expect me to fall apart. and honestly, sometimes i feel like i'm just waiting for the other shoe to drop. like it's just a matter of time before everything just stops and i'm just... gone.

i know it sounds silly but sometimes i'll just lie in bed and watch the clock. not that it's like i'm counting down or anything but just watching it tick away. it's weird because it feels like time is just dragging on and on. like it's just stretching out forever. and i'm just stuck in the middle of it all feeling like i'm just waiting for the end.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text: idk how much more of this i can take, feel like i'm drowning in my own sadness and grief after ben and i broke up. everyone's always like "just talk to him, work it out" but it's not that easy for me, idk. maybe i'm just too stubborn to admit defeat, but it's been weeks and i still can't seem to shake off this feeling of emptiness. i keep thinking about just... not waking up, i guess. idk, it sounds crazy, but it's all i can think about sometimes. maybe it's just the exhaustion catching up with me, but all i can imagine is me just disappearing, and no one even noticing. like, i wouldn't even leave a note or anything, i'd just... cease to exist. idk, it's a weird thought, but it's what i keep coming back to. ben's gone, and i'm left with this huge hole in my chest that i don't know how to fill. i keep telling myself to get back out there, try to meet new people, but idk, it feels like i'm just pretending to be okay when i'm really not. maybe i'm just too scared to admit it, but the thought of living without ben is just too overwhelming. sometimes i find myself wondering what it would be like if everything just... stopped. you know, if the whole world just came to a standstill and i was the only one who was still awake. idk, it sounds morbid, but it's what i keep thinking about. i guess what i'm trying to say is that i feel lost and alone, and i don't know how to get out of this darkness. idk, maybe i'll just keep wandering around in circles until i figure it out.

i keep wondering what would happen if i just disappeared. would anyone even notice? would they even care? maybe they would just be relieved that i was gone. idk maybe thats what they all want, to be rid of me. thats a pretty messed up thought but im not sure if its entirely wrong.

i feel like im just stuck in this neverending cycle of sadness and anger and frustration. i dont know how to escape it. i keep trying to distract myself with work and TV and video games but nothing seems to work for long. eventually i just end up lying in bed staring at the ceiling wondering what the point of it all is.

i guess thats why i was thinking about the movie hercules the other day. i know its a classic but i just felt so connected to it. hes just so...lost and alone like me. but he doesnt give up. hes just keeps pushing forward even when everything feels like its falling apart. maybe thats the thing i need to do too. maybe im just not dead yet and theres still time to figure things out. idk maybe im just making excuses but idk what else to do

attrs.persona: a person living alone in a new city
attrs.register: lowercase, hurried, minimal punctuation

text:
i feel like im just floating here, you know? no anchors to the ground, no sense of belonging. just me, in this new city, with nobody to turn to. its been months since i moved here, but it still feels like im just a ghost, invisible and alone.

i wake up every morning, staring at the same four walls, wondering why im even here. the city outside is so loud, so overwhelming, but inside my head its just a silent scream. i feel like im just going through the motions, waiting for something to happen, but its never going to happen.

sometimes i find myself thinking about what it would be like to just stop. to not wake up, to not have to deal with any of this anymore. to just disappear into nothingness. its not that i want to hurt anyone, its just that i feel so insignificant, so small. like i could just fade away, and nobody would even notice.

i know its stupid, i know its not a solution to anything. but sometimes its all i can think about. to just be nothing. to be forgotten. to have no one to answer to. its a strange kind of comfort, i guess. because then i dont have to deal with any of this anymore.

i feel like im just living in a dream, waiting for someone to pinch me and wake me up. but nobody ever does. i just keep drifting, lost in this sea of people, without any sense of direction. and sometimes, in the quiet moments, i think about just letting go. letting the world keep spinning, without me. its a scary thought, but its also kind of tempting.
